title: How Spotify runs agents across 20M+ lines of code, with Niklas Gustavsson
summary: Spotify uses Claude agents to enable employees to describe ideas and rapidly generate working prototypes within hours across a codebase of over 20 million lines. The deployment leverages Claude's code understanding capabilities for large-scale software development workflows.
writeup: This conversation with Spotify's Niklas Gustavsson covers how the company deploys Claude agents across a codebase exceeding 20 million lines. The agents let employees describe an idea and generate working prototypes within hours, drawing on Claude's code understanding for large-scale software development. The takeaway is a concrete account of agent use at production scale rather than a demo: prototyping moves from days to hours, and the agents operate against an existing, very large codebase.
